testcase.name: test_super_admin_edit_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_toplotto_v3.py:157: in test_super_admin_edit_ticket assert r.status_code == 200, f"PUT /tickets/{tn} -> {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: PUT /tickets/TL26061300022 -> 405 {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_super_admin_cancel_paid_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_toplotto_v3.py:183: in test_super_admin_cancel_paid_ticket assert cr.status_code == 200, f"super_admin cancel paid ticket -> {cr.status_code} {cr.text}" E AssertionError: super_admin cancel paid ticket -> 400 {"detail":"Ticket déjà payé - annulation impossible"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_super_admin_hard_delete_ticket

failure.message: AssertionError: Hard-deleted ticket should 404, got 200 assert 200 == 404 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_toplotto_v3.py:196: in test_super_admin_hard_delete_ticket assert g.status_code == 404, f"Hard-deleted ticket should 404, got {g.status_code}" E AssertionError: Hard-deleted ticket should 404, got 200 E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
